title: About
name: Doug Fessler
headline: Software Engineer
bio: I am a Software Engineer that has grown up with a passion for creating things. I began creating games at an early age with an application called RPG Maker.
I taught myself C++ and when I discovered a game programming library called Allegro I fell in love with programming and never looked back.

highlights.title: Hearthstone
highlights.description: UI Framework and features engineering on one of the world's most popular digital card games.

highlights.title: StarBlood Arena
highlights.description: AI, game modes, and matchmaking for a PS4/PSVR multiplayer arena shooter.

highlights.title: Ghostbusters
highlights.description: Gameplay and AI systems on the official Ghostbusters tie-in game for PC, PS4, and Xbox One.
